sections.paragraph:
Original: צרי צרי

Transliteration: tserı̂y tsŏrı̂y

Phonetic: tser-ee'

BDB Definition:

  1. a kind of balsam, balm, salve
    1. as merchandise
    2. as medicine

Origin: from an unused root meaning to crack [as by pressure], hence, to leak

TWOT entry: 1967a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
